zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisela von Schweinfurt於1057年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 比可費爾德素爾茲巴賀時，她的父親Otto II. von Schwaben Pfalzgraf von Lothringen62歲，母親Immilla di Torino37歲。她和Arnold I. Graf von Dießen至少有2個兒子。她去世於1091年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 藍斯格 阿姆 萊赫迪斯 阿姆 阿莫瑟享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schweinfurt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Schweinfurt in Bavaria and Saxony.

nameMeanings.name: Gisela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Giselle
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisela von Schweinfurt was born in 1057, in Sulzbach, Birkenfeld, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Otto II. von Schwaben Pfalzgraf von Lothringen, was 62 and her mother, Immilla di Torino, was 37. She had at least 2 sons with Arnold I. Graf von Dießen. She died in 1091, in Dießen am Ammersee, Landsberg am Lech, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisela von Schweinfurt est née en 1057, à Sulzbach, Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Otto II. von Schwaben Pfalzgraf von Lothringen, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Immilla di Torino, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Arnold I. Graf von Dießen. Elle est décédée en 1091, à Dießen am Ammersee, Landkreis Landsberg am Lech, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisela von Schweinfurt 1057 in Sulzbach, Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto II. von Schwaben Pfalzgraf von Lothringen 62 und ihre Mutter Immilla di Torino 37. Sie hatte mit Arnold I. Graf von Dießen mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1091 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Dießen am Ammersee, Landkreis Landsberg am Lech, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisela von Schweinfurt è nata il nel 1057 nel Sulzbach, Landkreis Birkenfeld, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Otto II. von Schwaben Pfalzgraf von Lothringen, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Immilla di Torino, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Arnold I. Graf von Dießen. Morì nel 1091, nel Dießen am Ammersee, Landkreis Landsberg am Lech, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 34 anni.

Graf von Dießen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1091년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 랜드스버그 아 렉h 디ss 아 아머시에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisela von Schweinfurt родилась в 1057 г. в местности сулзбач, ландкрис биркенфелд, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto II. von Schwaben Pfalzgraf von Lothringen было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Immilla di Torino, 37. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Arnold I. Graf von Dießen. Она умерла в 1091 г. в местности диеssен ам аммирси, ландкрис ландсбирг ам леч, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 34 лет.
